data.title: Trump maintains Biden’s activist approach to Treasury issuance
data.description:
Trump is sticking with the debt strategy Republicans hated under Biden—and even thinking about going further with it. According to a report by Nouriel Roubini in the Financial Times on Thursday, the White House in 2025 is still using a controversial tactic called Activist Treasury Issuance. Under this approach, the US Treasury Department is cutting […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-bidens-activist-treasury-issuance/

data.title: DeFAI project HeyElsa completes $3 million financing, led by M31Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeFAI project HeyElsa announced that it has completed $3 million in financing. This round of financing was led by M31Capital, and Coinbase Ventures' Base Ecosystem Fund, MH_Ventures, AbsolutaDigital, 2sharesfund, levitate_labs and others participated. The funds will be used to build an artificial intelligence stack in the crypto field, convert natural language into on-chain operations and bridge the gap between SDK, API and infrastructure.

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Rise Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial unemployment claims in the United States has increased for the second consecutive week, indicating a weakening labor market amid escalating economic headwinds from tariffs. During and after the COVID-19 pandemic, companies generally hoarded workers due to labor shortages. However, the growing uncertainty caused by tariffs under U.S. President Donald Trump's administration has forced some businesses to lay off employees. Economists anticipate that initial unemployment claims will exceed the range of 205,000 to 243,000 in 2025, primarily due to difficulties in adjusting data for seasonal fluctuations, a trend observed in recent years. The rise in continuing unemployment claims aligns with a decline in consumer confidence in the job market.

data.title: HTX has deposited 570 million USDT back to Aave
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the 570 million USDT withdrawn by HTX from Aave in the past 3 hours has been redeposited, which has brought the soaring USDT lending rate on Aave back to normal from around 30%, with the current deposit rate at 3.73% and the borrowing rate at 5.06%. Previously, affected by the decline in borrowable liquidity, USDT's deposit and borrowing rates soared, with the deposit rate rising from 3.8% to 29% and the borrowing rate rising from 4.4% to 33.6%.

data.title: Jobless claims rise for second week as tariff headwinds intensify
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial unemployment claims in the United States increased for the second consecutive week last week, indicating that labor market conditions have weakened amid the intensification of economic headwinds from tariffs. During and after the new crown pandemic, companies generally hoarded workers after struggling to find labor, but the growing uncertainty caused by President Trump’s tariffs has forced some companies to lay off employees. Economists expect the number of initial unemployment claims this month to break through the 2025 range of 205,000 to 243,000, mainly due to the difficulty in adjusting the data for seasonal fluctuations, and similar trends have been seen in recent years. The increase in the number of continuing unemployment claims is consistent with the decline in consumer confidence in the job market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate held an AMA on the LAUSDT contract, and CBO Kevin explained the compensation plan in detail
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate held an English AMA live broadcast on the official X, responding positively to the recent abnormal price of LAUSDT perpetual contracts. Gate Chief Business Officer Kevin Lee publicly explained the incident, the emergency response process and the compensation decision, and answered user questions on the spot.
Kevin said that Gate had quickly activated the risk control mechanism after the incident, and immediately offlined the contract, settled the order and issued an announcement simultaneously to ensure that the information was open and transparent and minimize user losses. He emphasized that the platform did not have any internal manipulation behavior, and announced a detailed compensation plan: retain user profits, do not roll back orders, and the platform will bear the full amount of the position, with a total amount of more than 30 million USDT.
The entire AMA lasted nearly an hour, and users asked questions actively during the live broadcast, covering key issues such as platform responsibility, system stability and compensation details. Kevin promised that Gate will continue to strengthen the technical system and strengthen communication with the community. "We always stand with users and the community and will jointly promote the platform forward."

data.title: Truth Social Submits Bitcoin ETF Application to SEC
data.description: According to PANews, Truth Social, the social media platform owned by U.S. President Donald Trump, has filed an S-1 document with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). The application marks a significant step for the platform in entering the cryptocurrency market. The filing was reported by Cointelegraph on June 5, 2025.

data.title: A whale sold some HYPE tokens for a profit, realizing a profit of $1.2 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the whale address qianbaidu.eth has recently started to sell for profit after purchasing 420,000 HYPE tokens (total value of about 13.4 million US dollars) at an average price of 31.9 US dollars. 
At present, the address has sold 235,000 HYPE (about 8.7 million US dollars) at an average price of 37 US dollars, realizing a profit of about 1.2 million US dollars. The address still holds 185,000 HYPE tokens, currently worth about 6.55 million US dollars.
